payload.label: picture frame
payload.long_description: Close-up of the lower-left corner of a dark brown wooden picture frame with a glossy finish and a thin gold inner trim surrounding a muted sailboat print; the frame is partially cropped at the image edges and shows minor surface wear and varnish highlights — estimated distance from camera ≈ 0.6 m.

message.content: {"label":"picture frame","short_description":"dark wooden picture frame edge","long_description":"Close-up of the lower-left corner of a dark brown wooden picture frame with a glossy finish and a thin gold inner trim surrounding a muted sailboat print; the frame is partially cropped at the image edges and shows minor surface wear and varnish highlights — estimated distance from camera ≈ 0.6 m.","attributes":["dark brown wood","gold inner trim","glossy varnish sheen","lower-left edge cropped","partial sailboat artwork visible","rectangular frame","minor wear/scuffs"],"distance_from_camera_m":0.6}
